title: Add simulation config to A/B Testing Platform — experiment assignment failure, analytics pipeline lag, statistical significance delay
description: Template ab-testing-platform.json has no simulation section. Add: (1) 3 chaos scenarios: experiment assignment failure, analytics pipeline lag, statistical significance delay, (2) bottleneck progression, (3) cost breakdown per component, (4) performance targets.
acceptanceCriteria: 3 chaos scenarios with targetNodes referencing actual template node IDs
Bottleneck progression identifies first component to saturate
Cost breakdown covers each node with realistic per-hour estimates
